description: You are a clinical informatics engineer evaluating OpenICE for an event detection system. Your goal is to generate device activity, analyze the application logs, and build a monitoring tool. Generate activity by starting at least two distinct simulated device adapters in the OpenICE Supervisor. Create an executable bash script at /home/ga/Desktop/event_monitor.sh that extracts and counts device-related events from /home/ga/openice/logs/openice.log, saving the analysis to /home/ga/Desktop/event_summary.txt. Document the log entry structure, three observed log patterns, and clinical event monitoring recommendations in /home/ga/Desktop/log_format_doc.txt.
